content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.36%, Bank Nifty -0.77% with VIX +2.4% to 17.02 — broader market soft but sector dispersion is huge: IT +0.84%, Pharma +0.51%, Capital Goods/Cables/Specialty Chem leading. Strong stock-specific moves on Q4 results across the board (PIDILITIND +8.5%, COFORGE +15.5%, LUPIN +4.1%, PNBHOUSING +4.1%, HAL +4.1%, POLYCAB +9.3%). Book is +1.58% on the day with 11 of 13 holdings green; priority is trailing SLs to lock gains and pruning the BHARATFORG stale order, not piling new admits.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1066.24,
      "new_target": 1140.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+10.7% unrealized, CMP 1089.50, current SL 1066.24 already at +8.4% lock-in (gap of 2.1% below CMP — within trail-gap discipline). Raise target to 1140 (just below 52w high 1141.90) to capture the run. SL stays — already protective. Q4 beat (PAT +19% YoY, EPS surprise +14%) digested; Marketsmojo flagged momentum exhaustion so don't chase target higher."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-0.6% unrealized; SL 121.00 ~2.7% below CMP. Defensive hedge with VIX rising. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 4950.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+4.8% unrealized, CMP 4800. Stored SL 4725.56 (~1.55% below CMP, within trail-gap discipline). Tighten target slightly from 5000 to 4950 — Geojit-style 4875 TP territory and stock is up 31% in 5 weeks (extended). Don't loosen SL; partial profit on first trip to 4950 makes sense. SL stays unchanged (no-op SL but target moves)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7250.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+2.0% unrealized, CMP 7040.50. Stored SL 6960 = -1.14% below CMP (right at trail-gap floor — do NOT tighten further or risk forced exit on noise). Trim target from 7400 to 7250 — stock just below 52w high 7200, recent rejection there 04-30. Lock realistic capture. SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 60,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Entry 838, CMP 840.60 — virtually flat at +0.3% after the 13% spike on May-5 has stalled. Today opened 842, faded to 835 then back to 840 — breakout is failing to extend on 5.9x volume which is distribution-quality action, not accumulation. Q4 results upcoming = binary risk. Capital better redeployed. This is post-entry new info (failed follow-through on huge volume), not pre-existing — Rule 15 satisfied."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.7%, CMP 366.35, SL 365 just 0.4% below — proximity to SL acknowledged but Rule 17 binds: thesis (Q4 PAT +30.6%, lending book Rs 2.07L cr) intact, no NEW post-entry information. Let the SL do its job; do NOT panic-close like Day-12. SL placement was the calibrated worst case."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 820.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.3% unrealized, CMP 832.90. SL at breakeven 820 = -1.55% below CMP (within trail-gap floor). Trim target from 860 to 855 — stock at fresh ATH and EBITDA margin contracted ~115bps YoY, copra tailwind largely priced. SL unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1329.47,
      "new_target": 1395.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "+6.5% unrealized, CMP 1350.50. Stored SL 1329.47 = -1.56% below CMP (trail-gap-compliant). Q4 PAT +124% YoY, +30% revenue, +15.55% intraday on upper-circuit-style move. Strong momentum but already huge gap up — don't raise target above 1395. SL stays at +5.6% lock-in. No-op MODIFY but recording for clarity → switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.9%, CMP 3059.30, SL at entry 3025 = -1.13% below CMP (right at trail-gap floor). FY26 revenue +38%, PAT +41.8%; concall May-12 catalyst pending. Defense thesis intact. Hold — too early to trail tighter."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 827.41,
      "new_target": 870.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+4.1% unrealized, CMP 844.05. Stored SL 827.41 = -2.0% below CMP (compliant). Trim target from 875 to 870 — stock just 4% from 52w high 875; book gains as it approaches resistance. SL unchanged → no-op SL with target adjustment is valid signal."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-0.8%, CMP 1480, SL 1445 = -2.4% below. Q4 PAT +36.6% YoY, EBITDA margin +280bps — strong fundamental backdrop. Stock was up 8.5% intraday at peak (1515) before fading to 1480, post-results consolidation. Hold; thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.5%, CMP 2439, SL 2400 = -1.6% below. Q4 today: PAT +87.5% YoY, US sales +57%, EBITDA margin 33.6%. Concall TODAY post-market — binary catalyst within 0 sessions. Position is 4.4% of capital so under 5% event-trade threshold (Rule 11). Stock already digested results moving from prior close ~2343 to 2439 (+4%); SL is worst-case loss budgeted. Hold through call."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1570.00,
      "new_target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.4%, CMP 1618.40, current SL 1545 = -4.5% below — still wide. Tighten SL up to 1570 (-3.0% from CMP, well above trail-gap floor) since stock printed 1649 today (+5.3%), then faded. Locks risk while preserving recovery. Q4 swung to PAT +Rs 164cr from Rs -45cr loss YoY; biotech +>100%. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 5,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 9100.00,
      "stop_loss": 8800.00,
      "target": 9550.00,
      "confidence": 0.70,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Q4 record print: revenue +26.9% YoY, FY26 PAT +32%, market share 30-31% (+3-4pp), Citi TP raised to 10,500. Fresh ATH on confirmed leadership. Position size: 5 x 9100 = Rs 45,500 = 4.5% of capital. SL 8800 = -3.3%, target 9550 = +4.95%, R:R = 450/300 = 1.5:1 (meets floor). Risk budget: 4.5% × 3.3% = 0.15% of portfolio (within 0.5% cap). Capital Goods cluster check: TITAGARH being exited, HAL still held — POLYCAB is cable/W&C sub-cluster, distinct from defense+rolling-stock. One new admit in cluster acceptable per Rule 10."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Open BUY 25x @ 2015 placed 355min ago — auto sector flat today, BHARATFORG sector leader info notes +8.41% but the limit at 2015 likely now stale. Letting it sit risks fill at unfavorable level if market dips into close. Will issue cancel via OPEN order management — but schema requires CANCEL through different mechanism; flagging for next tick. For this slot, no new same-direction order."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {"symbol": "PNBHOUSING", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1066.24, "reasoning": "SL already locks +8.4%; target raised to 1140."},
    {"symbol": "GOLDBEES", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Defensive hedge intact."},
    {"symbol": "HAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 4725.56, "reasoning": "SL locks +3.3%; target trimmed to 4950."},
    {"symbol": "NAVINFLUOR", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 6960.00, "reasoning": "SL right at trail-gap floor; target trimmed to 7250."},
    {"symbol": "TITAGARH", "current_action": "EXIT", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Failed follow-through after 13% spike on huge volume = distribution; capital redeployed."},
    {"symbol": "ABCAPITAL", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Rule 17 — let SL do its job; thesis intact."},
    {"symbol": "MARICO", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 820.00, "reasoning": "SL at breakeven; target trimmed to 855."},
    {"symbol": "COFORGE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 1329.47, "reasoning": "SL locks +5.6%; thesis confirmed by Q4."},
    {"symbol": "GRSE", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Concall May-12; let SL fire if needed."},
    {"symbol": "CAMS", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": 827.41, "reasoning": "SL locks +2.7%; target trimmed to 870."},
    {"symbol": "PIDILITIND", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Q4 catalyst supportive; SL adequate."},
    {"symbol": "LUPIN", "current_action": "HOLD", "new_stop_loss": null, "reasoning": "Holding through concall today; size <5% capital."},
    {"symbol": "WOCKPHARMA", "current_action": "TRAIL_SL", "new_stop_loss": 1570.00, "reasoning": "Tighten 1545→1570 after stock printed 1649 high; trail-gap-compliant."}
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "FINCABLES — board meeting May-10 (2 sessions away) = binary event; Rule 11 disqualifies new entry now. Reassess post-results. PIDILITIND sister-name in Chemicals already held. SRF (+10.4%) — qualifying chemical breakout but NAVINFLUOR + PIDILITIND already cover specialty chem cluster; skip. COFORGE post-result momentum captured via existing position; not adding more. INDUSINDBK — governance overhang from Day-5 still unresolved per Rule 13; skip. THERMAX/BHARATFORG/GABRIEL — auto/cap-goods cluster already saturated by HAL/GRSE/POLYCAB add. SOBHA — high vol on -1% day is distress signal, not accumulation. WOCKPHARMA / LUPIN already capture pharma momentum.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 63% with TITAGARH exit will free ~Rs 50K back to ~57%, then POLYCAB add brings back to ~62%. Within soft 80% target; still room for 1-2 more admits if quality setups appear later. Cluster check: Capital Goods = HAL + GRSE + POLYCAB (post-trade) = ~Rs 1.0L = 10% of capital — within 35% cap. Pharma = LUPIN + WOCKPHARMA = ~Rs 9.3L = 9% — fine. Financial Services = PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS = ~Rs 17K = 17% — fine. Day's realized P&L +1186 with TITAGARH exit ~+141; book +1.58% — green session. Stale BHARATFORG limit needs explicit cancel mechanism on next decision cycle (engine-side)."
}
